description: Decouple .agents/skills/ as shared Agent Skills layer, add full .codex/ directory support
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(codex): decouple .agents/skills/ as shared Agent Skills layer (agentskills.io standard)
- feat(codex): add .codex/ directory with config, agents, skills, and SessionStart hooks
- feat(cli): add branch context to session journal records (#108)

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(iflow): revert incorrect --agent flag change from PR #112
- fix(codex): correct agent TOML format (name + description + developer_instructions)

**Migration:**
- Auto-upgrade legacy Codex installs (.agents/skills/ without .codex/) on trellis update
- safe-file-delete for .agents/skills/parallel/ and old trellis-*.toml agents

migrations.description: Renamed to implement.toml with corrected TOML format
Renamed to research.toml with corrected TOML format
Renamed to check.toml with corrected TOML format

notes: Run `trellis update` to sync. Codex hooks require `features.codex_hooks = true` in ~/.codex/config.toml.
